title: Amogus Totem
description: This is a texture pack I made that replaces the Totem of undying with an amogus 3d model you must have optifine or the cit mod for the model to be visible
body:
I made a model of an amogus for my friends and I decided to post it here,

***it works for every version that has [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or the [CIT mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn).***

Here are some images:

![Amogus Shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iUU8FjTl/images/9da56456a6a5e55156279bf72039edf3b380dff1.png)

![Amogus Hand](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iUU8FjTl/images/49fe659ef6476d86d18a3466108c35072c3844c8.png)

![Amogus Death](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/iUU8FjTl/images/be4f212398720fe5e74cb5dad35300bbd998e166.png)
